headline: Bank Of America Digital Surge Sparks Questions On Efficiency And Valuation
summary: Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) reports record digital engagement, with nearly 30 billion client digital interactions in the past year. AI assistant Erica has handled more than 3.2 billion interactions since launch, highlighting extensive client use of virtual support. Digital payment and financial wellness platforms, including Zelle and CashPro, are reaching usage records across consumer, wealth, and corporate clients. The bank links this activity to ongoing investments in AI and technology...
